title: Institution Rankings
subtitle: Government institutions ranked by procurement risk and vendor concentration — click column headers to sort
tableDescription: {{count}} institutions. Click column headers to sort. Click an institution name to view its profile.

columns.concentrationTooltip: Vendor Concentration: 1.0 = single vendor, 0.0 = perfectly competitive

publicationDelay.title: Publication Delay Transparency
publicationDelay.description: Days between procedure publication and contract award. Shorter windows compress vendor preparation time and favour pre-selected suppliers.
